Shield of Spikes  

Description

1: Increase Damage Shield by 5 (L37) to 22 (L49)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 100 Skill: Abjuration
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 15 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You are surrounded by a thorny barrier.
Cast on other: Soandso is surrounded by a thorny barrier.
Effect Fades: The brambles fall away.

Game Description

Surrounds your target in a shield of spikes that cause damage to anything that strikes them for 12.1 mins @L37 to 15.0 mins @L47.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Shield of Spikes

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Shield of Spikes
ClassLevel
DRU37
RNG58
Expansion:

Duration:
12.1 mins @L37 to 15.0 mins @L47
  • Comments (3)
  • Sold By (11)
